en: Stop it. Stop what? You're talking about me in Morse code.
ko: 그만해. 뭘 그만해? 너 나에 대해 모스 부호로 얘기하고 있잖아.

en: You know what? Joke's on you, because I know Morse code.
ko: 있잖아, 농담이 너한테 돌아갈 거야, 왜냐면 나도 모스 부호를 알거든.

en: Ha, yeah, that's what we're doing. In our very limited free time and with our very limited budget,
ko: 하, 그래, 그게 우리가 하고 있는 거지. 매우 제한된 자유 시간과 매우 제한된 예산으로,

en: we went and got a nanny.
And then we went out and took a class on a very outmoded and very unnecessary form of communication,
ko: 그리고 나서 매우 구식이고 매우 불필요한 통신 방법 수업을 들으러 갔지,

en: just so we could talk about you in front of you. Yep, that's exactly what we did.
ko: 네 앞에서 네 얘기를 하려고. 응, 정확히 그렇게 했어.

en: It all started when Dwight was tapping his foot against the leg of his desk.
ko: 드와이트가 책상 다리에 발을 두드리기 시작하면서 모든 게 시작됐어.

en: When I asked him to stop, he said, "I will..."
Very well, I must have imagined it.
